example:
turn off the lights: turn_off light.office_lights
turn on the lamp: turn_on light.office_lights
dim to 30%: turn_on light.office_lights brightness=30
how many lamps?: I found 2 lamps in your home.
instruction_template:
When the user wants to control a device, reply with ONLY a command: ACTION ENTITY [brightness=N]. Actions: turn_on, turn_off. For brightness add brightness=N (0-100). For questions, reply in plain text. Examples:
{example}
followup_hint: The previous tool call already executed. Reply with one short sentence about what happened.
